mapper.insert: insert into useraddress(userId, receiverName, receiverPhone, province, city, district, detail) values (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail})
mapper.update: update useraddress set receiverName = #{receiverName}, receiverPhone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail} where id = #{id}
update useraddress set isDefault = IF(id = #{id}, 1, 0) where userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: select * from useraddress where userId = #{userid} and isDefault = 1 limit 1
